# Series A Due Diligence Data Room Checklist (April 2026)

## Summary
April 2026 practitioner guide covering the 50-70 document standard for a Series A data room across 7-8 major categories. Key finding: 68% of failed deals cite incomplete or disorganized documentation as a primary factor. A well-organized data room compresses deal timelines by 2-4 weeks and increases close rate. The "investor speed test" - founders who can produce 5 core documents within 24 hours (fully diluted cap table, 3 years audited financials, current month P&L, ESOP scheme summary, data room index) are considered investor-ready. Categories: Corporate/Governance, Financial Statements, Cap Table/Equity, IP/Contracts, Compliance/Regulatory, Legal/Risk, Team/Product.

## Key quotations / statistics
- "VCs expect 50-70 documents organized across 7-8 major categories in a Series A data room"
- "68% of failed deals cite incomplete or disorganized documentation as a primary factor"
- "35% faster deal close with organized data rooms"
- "Median seed round takes 3-6 months; a ready data room compresses that by 2-4 weeks"
- "Organized data rooms can reduce deal timeline by up to 6 weeks"
- Five investor speed test items: "Fully diluted cap table, Last 3 years audited financials, Current month P&L, ESOP scheme summary, Data room index with links"
- Cap Table section items: "Fully diluted cap table with all shareholders, ownership percentages; ESOP scheme documents and option holder lists; Convertible instrument terms and vesting schedules; Prior round documents (SAFEs, convertible notes, term sheets)"
- IP section: "IP assignment agreements from founders, employees, and contractors" - "founders typically forget" these

## Annotations for stinger-forge
- This is the primary source for `guides/07-data-room-checklist.md` and `templates/data-room-folder-structure.md`.
- The 7-category folder structure maps directly to the template: Corporate/Governance, Financial, Cap Table/Equity, IP/Contracts, Compliance/Regulatory, Legal/Risk, Team/Product.
- The "founders typically forget" list (IP assignments from founders AND employees AND contractors, D&O insurance, change-of-control provisions) should be a prominently-flagged warning box in the guide.
- The 68% failed-deals / 35% faster-close statistics are strong motivators for the data room guide's opening.
- The 5-item investor speed test should be the opener for `guides/07-data-room-checklist.md` - it gives founders an immediate actionability test.
- Note: this source includes India-specific compliance items (GST, FEMA filings) that are not relevant to the US Delaware C-Corp focus of this stinger - filter these from the guide output.
